caption: A person's hands hold up a sports trading card for the camera, featuring NBA player Aaron Gordon of the Denver Nuggets. The card is labeled "OBSIDIAN" at the top and "AARON GORDON NUGGETS" at the bottom, showcasing the athlete in a blue and white jersey. The hands move slightly to tilt the card, catching the light on its holographic edges. In the background, a man wearing a black shirt sits at a desk with computer equipment. A red and black surface is visible, featuring the "JASPYS" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" displayed on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the card is held steady while the fingers adjust their grip, maintaining a focus on the card's details against the blurred background of the room.
